channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New details on White House Correspondents' Dinner shooting
item.description: President Trump evacuated after shots fired outside ballroom.

item.title: Photos show British royal visits to US over the years
item.description: King Charles makes first state visit as monarch, has visited US 19 times before.

item.title: Crocodile climbs into Zimbabwe hotel kitchen
item.description: Footage shows large crocodile entering kitchen near Victoria Falls.

item.title: Haitians, Syrians watch Supreme Court arguments on temporary status
